categories.name: AlexKontorovich/PrimeNumberTheoremAnd

categories.name: PatrickMassot/GlimpseOfLean

categories.name: Verified-zkEVM/ZKLib

categories.name: lean-ja/lean-by-example

categories.name: leanprover-community/aesop

categories.name: leanprover-community/duper
categories.reasoning: Duper is an automatic theorem prover tool that can be added to existing Lean 4 projects to provide automated proof capabilities. It serves as reusable infrastructure similar to Isabelle's Metis, making it a general-purpose library for the Lean ecosystem.

categories.name: leanprover-community/iris-lean

github_metadata.description: Lean 4 port of Iris, a higher-order concurrent separation logic framework

categories.name: leanprover-community/mathlib4

categories.name: leanprover-community/quote4
